arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola sends Erling Haaland injury update for Man City vs Liverpool after Real Madrid no-show
arts.sum: Manchester City lost to Real Madrid in the Champions League with injured striker Erling Haaland remaining on the bench throughout at the Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Player Ratings: Real Madrid 3 - 1 Manchester City; UEFA Champions League Playoff 2025
arts.sum: Produced an inch perfect 50 yard long ball over the top of the City defense to assist Kylian Mbappe on the opening goal. Real Madrid dominate at the Bernabeu and Kylian Mbappe gets his first Champions League hat-trick with his new club.

arts.ttl: Guardiola: “Real Madrid have grown in many ways”
arts.sum: Manchester City ’s Champions League campaign came to an end at the Santiago Bernabéu after a 3-1 defeat to a vastly superior Real Madrid . Despite the loss, Guardiola dismissed the notion that City felt powerless against Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand reveals worrying trait he's never seen from Pep Guardiola's Man City before in Champions League collapse against Real Madrid
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola's men have failed to reach the round of 16 for the first time since he took over, as Kylian Mbappe netted a stunning hat-trick to lead Los Blancos to a 3-1 victory at Santiago Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Haaland, Bradley, Saka: The early FPL Gameweek 26 team news
arts.sum: An injury overview of all 20 Premier League clubs The post Haaland, Bradley, Saka: The early FPL Gameweek 26 team news appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham picks unlikely name as “the most gifted player” in Real Madrid squad
arts.sum: But the Brazilian is a relentless presence in big games for Madrid, often as important to the set-up as the likes of Bellingham, Mbappé or Vinicius. Specifically, he asked Bellingham about the role that Rodrygo plays in this Madrid side.

arts.ttl: Mbappé praises Real Madrid's 'perfect night' to advance past Man City in Champions League playoffs
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé was celebrating a “perfect night” with Real Madrid — one that included his third Champions League hat-trick and his club securing a spot in the round of 16 to keep alive its hopes of winning a record 16th European title. Madrid player Jude Bellingham was among those praising Mbappé's performance against City.

arts.ttl: Mbappe 'flying' high at Real and now wants to 'make history'
arts.sum: Real Madrid forward Kylian Mbappe's goal against Manchester City in the first leg may have come from a scrappy finish but there was nothing fortunate about his hat-trick in the return leg at Santiago Bernabeu on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Mbappé's hat trick inspires Madrid, as Man City are humbled out of Champions League
arts.sum: It was Kylian Mbappé's night to remember as his hat trick for Real Madrid put Pep Guardiola's Manchester City side out of the UEFA Champions League.

arts.ttl: The Real Madrid games Jude Bellingham will miss during red card ban
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham was sent off for Real Madrid during their La Liga clash with Osasuna.
